overall.description: Aerial drone footage flying through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, showcasing neon-lit megabuildings, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture. The camera smoothly navigates above highway interchanges and between towering skyscrapers in the Japantown district of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, with atmospheric haze and dramatic neon lighting dominating the visual aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial approach over highway interchange and circular plaza

agents.ego_description: drone camera flying steadily forward over the urban landscape, capturing the layout of the circular plaza and surrounding megabuildings

entered.detail: large circular traffic plaza with illuminated pathways visible from above
tallest skyscraper with prominent vertical neon lighting and holographic displays
multi-level highway ramps with moving vehicle lights
cluster of illuminated glass skyscrapers with grid-pattern windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a futuristic city's circular plaza and highway interchange. The drone moves smoothly forward toward a massive neon-lit tower dominating the skyline, with glass office towers visible to the left and commercial buildings emerging on the right. The atmosphere is hazy with scattered light from sparse traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: on-screen text 'JAPANTOWN' appears identifying the district

agents.ego_description: drone navigates through the canyon of skyscrapers, passing close to large holographic billboards and dense neon signage

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in massive digital advertisements and animated holographic displays
concentrated area of bright neon signs and illuminated commercial facades
raised railway or monorail track running between buildings

segments.scene_description: The drone flies through a dense commercial district characterized by massive holographic billboards and intense neon lighting. The Japantown label appears on screen as the camera moves deeper into the urban canyon, with the mega tower now closer and more prominent. Elevated transit lines and dense advertising create a cluttered, vibrant cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition to industrial outer district with sprawling city view

agents.ego_description: drone continues past the dense commercial core, revealing the expansive sprawl of the city and transitioning toward industrial sectors

entered.detail: lower-rise industrial structures with minimal lighting compared to the commercial district
dense collection of illuminated buildings extending to the horizon
highway ramps passing directly below the camera view

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the drone moving past the dense neon core into a more industrial outer district. The mega tower recedes into the left background while the view opens up to reveal the vast sprawl of the city extending into the hazy distance. Elevated highways dominate the foreground as the commercial intensity gives way to industrial structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins at a structured urban interchange and plunges into a vibrant neon core before expanding into a vast industrial sprawl. It begins by gliding over a circular plaza and highway interchange, moving steadily toward a massive, neon-lit tower that dominates the hazy skyline. As the camera pushes deeper into the urban canyon, the environment shifts into the dense commercial district of Japantown, where the view becomes cluttered with intense holographic billboards and elevated transit lines. The scene then transitions away from this vibrant center, with the mega tower receding into the background as the camera passes through the neon core. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal the sprawling industrial outer district, where the commercial intensity gives way to elevated highways and a distant, hazy city horizon.
